headline: System architecture broke out as the dominant technique this month while the agent tooling stack consolidated around MCP.
body: System architecture surged on rising momentum and crossed into breakout territory, the clearest rotation of the window, alongside an infrastructure breakout in KV cache quantization. Model Context Protocol anchored a wave of agent-tooling material, from Looker agent configuration and MCP client and server fundamentals to Google Chrome's proposed WebMCP standard for structured agent actions on the web. Parallelism moved up the agenda as Cursor detailed running 128 coding agents at once with inter-agent communication and review. New entrants including text-to-CAD, faithful generation, cross-modal prediction, and Target Distribution Design appeared at the edges without yet building momentum.

cited_items.title: Your first agent configuration with MCP and Looker
The agent-ready web: Simplify user actions with WebMCP — Tara Agyemang, Google
